zh.lifeSummary: 當Ellice Butler於1480年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 基爾堅尼時，她的父親James Butler43歲，母親Lady Sabh Kavanagh40歲。她和George LeFleming至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。她去世在她的家鄉，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 基爾堅尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ellice Butler于1480年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 基爾堅尼时，她的父亲James Butler43岁，母亲Lady Sabh Kavanagh40岁。她和George LeFleming至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。她去世在她的家乡，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 基爾堅尼。

nameMeanings.name: Butler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from a word that originally denoted a wine steward, usually the chief servant of a medieval household, from Norman French butuiller (Old French bouteillier, Latin buticularius, from buticula ‘bottle’). In the large households of royalty and the most powerful nobility, the title came to denote an officer of high rank and responsibility, only nominally concerned with the supply of wine, if at all. As well as being widespread in England, this is also the surname of an important Irish family, descended from Theobald FitzWalter, who was appointed Chief Butler of Ireland by King Henry II in 1177. It is Gaelicized as de Buitléir.

English: occasionally perhaps an occupational name from Middle English boteler ‘maker of bottles (usually of leather)’, a derivative of Middle English botel, Old French bo(u)teille ‘bottle’ and synonymous with Botelmaker.
Americanized form of French   Bouthillier   (see   Bouteiller  ).

variants.name: Buttler
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Butler  .
German: occupational name for a village tavern owner, from French bouteillier ‘butler’.
Americanized form of German Buttlar: habitational name from a place so named in Thuringia.

variants.name: Bouthillier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Jacques, Normand, Philippe, Yves.
French: variant of   Bouteiller  . This name is sometimes Americanized as   Butler  . Compare   Boutilier  .

nameMeanings.name: Ellice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the numerous girls' names beginning with the syllable El-, in particular Eleanor . At the beginning of the 21st century it enjoyed a surge in popularity as an independent given name, often also used in compounds such as Ellie-Ann, Ellie-Mae, and Ellie-Louise.

variants.name: Elly
meanings: Pet form of any of the numerous girls' names beginning with the syllable El-, in particular Eleanor . At the beginning of the 21st century it enjoyed a surge in popularity as an independent given name, often also used in compounds such as Ellie-Ann, Ellie-Mae, and Ellie-Louise.

historicEvents.description: Henry VIII dies, succeeded by the boy king Edward VI. England and Ireland were ruled by the senior nobility of England.

en.lifeSummary: When Ellice Butler was born in 1480, in County Kilkenny, Ireland, her father, James Butler, was 43 and her mother, Lady Sabh Kavanagh, was 40. She had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with George LeFleming. She died in her hometown, and was buried in County Kilkenny, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ellice Butler est née en 1480, à County Kilkenny, Irlande, son père, James Butler, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Lady Sabh Kavanagh, avait 40 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec George LeFleming. Elle est décédée dans sa ville natale, et a été enterrée à County Kilkenny, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ellice Butler 1480 in County Kilkenny, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater James Butler 43 und ihre Mutter Lady Sabh Kavanagh 40. Sie hatte mit George LeFleming mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in County Kilkenny, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ellice Butler è nata il nel 1480 nel County Kilkenny, Irlanda, sua padre, James Butler, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Lady Sabh Kavanagh, aveva 40 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con George LeFleming. Morì nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolta a County Kilkenny, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Ellice Butlerが1480年にアイルランドコウントイ キルケニーで生まれた時，父James Butlerは43歳，母Lady Sabh Kavanaghは40歳であった。彼女はGeorge LeFlemingとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は故郷で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ キルケニーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ellice Butler(이)가 1480년 아일랜드 카운티 킬켄이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James Butler(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Sabh Kavanagh(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 George LeFleming(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 그녀의 고향에서 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 킬켄이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ellice Butler nasceu em 1480, em County Kilkenny, Irlanda, seu pai, James Butler, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Lady Sabh Kavanagh, tinha 40 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com George LeFleming. Ela faleceu em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultada em County Kilkenny, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ellice Butler родилась в 1480 г. в местности коунти килкенни, Ирландия, её отцу по имени James Butler было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Sabh Kavanagh, 40. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от George LeFleming. Она умерла в её родном городе и была похоронена в местности коунти килкенни, Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ellice Butler nació en 1480, en County Kilkenny, Irlanda, su papá, James Butler, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Lady Sabh Kavanagh, tenía 40 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas con George LeFleming. Murió en su pueblo, y fue sepultada en County Kilkenny, Irlanda.
